programme.desc: Naruto: Imperdoável!Uma Total Falta De Respeito! - T01E90

programme.title: 2020. Gaara se transforma em Shukaku, o Espírito da Areia, e obtém uma vitória impressionante. Depois da batalha, alguns descobrem novos caminhos para seguir, e Naruto decide ser ainda mais forte ao ir numa jornada de treinamento com Jiraiya. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Partida - T01E220

programme.title: 2020. Bem-vindo à Aldeia Oculta da folha, onde ninjas assassinos percorrem a terra, e o travesso Naruto Uzumaki apronta encrenca aonde for. Ao roubar o antigo pergaminho do selo, ele libera um poder único raramente visto em um garoto de 12 anos! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Naruto Uzumaki Chegando! - T01E01

programme.title: 2020. Naruto finalmente se forma na Academia Ninja e diz que sabe tudo. Bom, pelo menos é isso que ele conta para Konohamaru, o neto tampinha do líder da aldeia. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Meu Nome É Konohamaru - T01E02

programme.title: 2020. Para se tornar um ninja, Naruto precisa formar uma equipe com seus colegas, a bela Sakura e o sério Sasuke, que têm uma coisa em comum: o ódio que sentem por Naruto. Então, Naruto tenta conquistar Sakura fingindo ser a paixão da vida dela... Sasuke! Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Sasuke E Sakura, Amigos Ou Inimigos
programme.desc: Naruto: Sasuke E Sakura, Amigos Ou Inimigos - T01E03

programme.title: 2020. Com a equipe formada, Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura conhecem seu sensei, o enigmático Kakashi. Ele propõe um desafio que apenas dois deles podem vencer - quem falhar voltará para a Academia Ninja! Mas eles não sabem que Kakashi nunca deixou ninguém vencer! Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Aprovar Ou Reprovar Um Exercício De Sobrevivencia
programme.desc: Naruto: Aprovar Ou Reprovar Um Exercício De Sobrevivencia - T01E04

programme.title: 2020. Com o iminente risco de falhar, Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura fazem de tudo para passar no árduo teste de sobrevivência. Mas esses ninjas egoístas precisarão escutar as palavras sábias de Kakashi para aprenderem sobre trabalho em equipe! Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Você Falhou A Decisão Finalde Kakashi
programme.desc: Naruto: Você Falhou A Decisão Finalde Kakashi - T01E05

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e sua equipe começam suas primeiras missões de ninja cumprindo tarefas entediantes e básicas. Cansado e com fome, Naruto desabafa com o Hokage que, entretido, propõe uma nova missão: proteger um velho rabugento chamado Tazuna até a casa dele! Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Uma Missão Perigosa, Uma Aventura No País Das Ondas
programme.desc: Naruto: Uma Missão Perigosa, Uma Aventura No País Das Ondas - T01E06

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e sua equipe chegam ao País das Ondas, onde o perverso negociante chamado Gato controla a terra. Gato contrata Zabuza Momochi para matar Tazuna. Animado, Naruto não vê a hora de enfrentar esse poderoso ninja assassino. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Assassino Da Névoa - T01E07

programme.title: 2020. Kakashi está em vantagem na batalha contra Zabuza, mas a situação se reverte quando Kakashi é preso na Prisão de Água de Zabuza! Kakashi insisite para que a equipe fuja, mas Naruto lembra da promessa que fez de nunca mais fugir e decide ficar!! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Juramento De Dor - T01E08

programme.title: 2020. Graças ao plano de Naruto, Kakashi escapa da Prisão de Água. Zabuza é derrotado e ferido, mas de repente um misterioso ninja rastreador aparece e mata Zabuza. Naruto se espanta ao ver um garoto não muito mais velho que ele derrotar Zabuza tão facilmente. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Kakashi, O Guerreiro Sharingan - T01E09

programme.title: 2020. Recuperando-se na casa de Tazuna, Kakashi conclui que Zabuza não morreu e que o jovem ninja o ajudou a escapar! Kakashi decide começar um novo treinamento para ajudar Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura a controlarem melhor seus chakras! Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Floresta do Chakra - T01E10

programme.title: 2020. Na aldeia com Tazuna, Sakura vê o sofrimento do povo no País das Ondas governado por Gato. Tazuna constrói uma ponte que dará acesso a outras terras para as pessoas não dependerem mais de Gato. Naruto e Sasuke treinam, usando chakra para subir em árvore. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Terra Onde Uma Vez o Herói Viveu
programme.desc: Naruto: A Terra Onde Uma Vez o Herói Viveu - T01E11

programme.title: 2020. Enquanto Naruto treina para controlar seu chacra, alguém misterioso aparece de repente e diz que, para se tornar forte, é preciso ter determinação para proteger o que ama. A figura misteriosa ecoa o sentimento de Naruto, e os dois sentem uma conexão. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Batalha Na Ponte: Zabuza Retorna - T01E12

programme.title: 2020. É hora de lutar contra Zabuza outra vez, e agora ele está acompanhado do ninja rastreador. Os dois reparam as habilidades de Sasuke, e ele percebe o imenso poder do ninja mascarado. Sasuke e o ninja se preparam para lutar, como se o destino os chamasse. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Jutsu Secreto De Haku: Espelhos De Cristal De Gelo
programme.desc: Naruto: O Jutsu Secreto De Haku: Espelhos De Cristal De Gelo - T01E13

programme.title: 2020. Sasuke está em apuros dentro dos Espelhos Cristal de Gelo de Haku, e Naruto chega para salvá-lo. Sasuke tem um plano para combater o jutsu de Haku, mas falha por causa das ações inesperadas de Naruto. Por fim, os dois jovens ninjas são presos. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Ninja Número Um Hiper Ativo E Cabeça Oca Entram Na Briga
programme.desc: Naruto: O Ninja Número Um Hiper Ativo E Cabeça Oca Entram Na Briga - T01E14

programme.title: 2020. Vendo que não há tempo a perder, Kakashi decide usar o Sharingan mais uma vez para derrotar Zabuza. Mas Zabuza é um ninja experiente em batalhas mortais e, na primeira vez em que enfrentou o Sharingan, Zabuza conseguiu bolar uma estratégia. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Visibilidade Zero: O Sharingan Desvendado - T01E15

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e Sasuke são atacados dentro dos Espelhos Cristal de Gelo de Haku. Durante a batalha, Sasuke percebe o poder do seu próprio Sharingan e começa a desviar dos ataques de Haku. Haku decide acabar com ele. Sasuke usa seu corpo para proteger Naruto... Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Selo Quebrado - T01E16

programme.title: 2020. Naruto finalmente explode! Sua raiva por Haku libera o poder da Raposa de Nove Caudas. O chakra de Naruto está tão intenso que até Kakashi e Zabuza, que estão lutando à distância, percebem. Haku é incapaz de fazer algo diante do poder secreto de Naruto. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Passado Branco, Ambição Escondida - T01E17

programme.title: 2020. Haku pede a Naruto que acabe com ele. Naruto questiona a filosofia de Haku sobre existir apenas para lutar e ganhar. Enquanto isso, a batalha entre Kakashi e Zabuza chega ao clímax. Com a vitória ao alcance, Kakashi libera sua manobra mais devastadora. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: As Armas Conhecidas Como Shinobi - T01E18

programme.title: 2020. Pensando em Haku, Naruto confronta Zabuza com raiva. Sem demonstrar emoções, Zabuza se sente arrasado pela perda de Haku, a única pessoa em quem confiava no mundo. Naruto aprende que esse tipo de realidade cruel é, de fato, o destino de um ninja. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Demônio Na Neve - T01E19

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e sua equipe voltam à Aldeia Oculta da Folha depois da batalha do País das Ondas. Mesmo concluindo novas missões, Naruto está insatisfeito com a rotina diária, mas logo ele descobre que estrangeiros estão se juntando na Aldeia da Folha. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Prova Chunin - T01E20

programme.title: 2020. Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura são escolhidos para fazer a Prova Chunin. Iruka se opõe à participação dos três, pois os considera muito novos e inexperientes para o desafio. Kakashi, porém, acredita que eles cresceram e estão mais prontos do que nunca. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Identifique-Se : Novos E Poderosos Rivais - T01E21

programme.title: 2020. Enquanto Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura se preparam para a prova, um ninja chamado Rock Lee aparece. Lee quer lutar contra Sasuke, que possui o poder do clã Uchiha. Sasuke aceita o desafio de Lee, mas fica só na defesa devido aos ataques rápidos desse oponente. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Desafio Chunin:Rock Lee Contra Sasuke
programme.desc: Naruto: O Desafio Chunin:Rock Lee Contra Sasuke - T01E22

programme.title: 2020. Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura se inscrevem oficialmente para a Prova Chunin e formam um time. Para passar, nenhum membro pode falhar. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Batalha Genin, Os Nove Novatos Se Enfrentam
programme.desc: Naruto: A Batalha Genin, Os Nove Novatos Se Enfrentam - T01E23

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e sua equipe iniciam a primeira prova. O examinador é Ibiki Morino, um jonin (ninja de alto nível) notório e perito em interrogração. Sasuke e Sakura estão preocupados, pois se Naruto responder tudo errado, eles também falharão. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Liguem Os Motores A Prova Chunin Começa
programme.desc: Naruto: Liguem Os Motores A Prova Chunin Começa - T01E24

programme.title: 2020. A parte mais difícil da prova começa na pergunta 10. Antes dos ninjas escutarem a pergunta, Ibiki coloca uma regra injusta para o problema: quem responder errado será reprovado e não terá o direito de fazer qualquer Prova Chunin no futuro. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Décima Pergunta Ou Tudo Ou Nada
programme.desc: Naruto: A Décima Pergunta Ou Tudo Ou Nada - T01E25

programme.title: 2020. Konohamaru, neto do Terceiro Hokage da Aldeia da Folha, aparece durante a Prova Chunin com Moegi e Udon e cobre eventos para o jornal da Academia Ninja. Ele vê Naruto como um irmão mais velho e, entrevistando os personagens, reconta suas aventuras. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Floresta Da Morte - T01E26

programme.title: 2020. Na floresta da morte começa a segunda parte da Prova Chunin. Cada time recebe um tipo de pergaminho e deve roubar o outro tipo de outro time, chegando ao ponto final na torre com os dois pergaminhos. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Prova Chunin Segunda Etapa A Floresta Da Morte
programme.desc: Naruto: A Prova Chunin Segunda Etapa A Floresta Da Morte - T01E27

programme.title: 2020. A segunda parte da prova começa na floresta da morte. Sasuke nota que um inimigo se disfarçou de Naruto. Sasuke salva e desamarra Naruto, e os três membros criam uma senha para quando ficarem separados outra vez. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Comer Ou Ser Comido - Pânico Na Floresta
programme.desc: Naruto: Comer Ou Ser Comido - Pânico Na Floresta - T01E28

programme.title: 2020. O ataque do ninja da Grama é poderoso demais para Sasuke e Sakura. Sasuke pensa em entregar o pergaminho, mas Naruto o impede. A raiva de Naruto cresce e seus poderes são revelados. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Contra-Ataque De Naruto, Nunca Se Renda!
programme.desc: Naruto: O Contra-Ataque De Naruto, Nunca Se Renda! - T01E29

programme.title: 2020. Ao ver Naruto lutar contra o ninja da Grama, Sasuke percebe que estava errado em fugir. Sasuke usa todo o potencial do seu Sharingan para afastar o ninja. Ele se apresenta como Orochimaru, some e deixa uma Marca da Maldição em Sasuke, que cai em dor. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Sharingan Revivido: Jutsu Chama Do Dragão
programme.desc: Naruto: O Sharingan Revivido: Jutsu Chama Do Dragão - T01E30

programme.title: 2020. Depois de ver a reportagem, Anko percebe um intruso na prova, Orochimaru, mas não consegue detê-lo. Sakura, cansada e com medo, tenta impedir o inimigo. O autoproclamado demônio bonitão da Aldeia da Folha, Rock Lee, aparece para o resgate! Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Promessa Do "Sobrancelhudo": Amor Eterno E Proteção
programme.desc: Naruto: A Promessa Do "Sobrancelhudo": Amor Eterno E Proteção - T01E31

programme.title: 2020. Protegendo Sakura, que não consegue mais se mover, Lee luta contra os três ninja do Som. Ele usa sua habilidade secreta, mas é ineficaz. Dosu o ataca, e Lee cai. Para proteger as pessoas que são importantes para ela, Sakura se levanta... Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Sakura Floresce - T01E32

programme.title: 2020. Enquanto Sakura se defende dos ninjas do Som sozinha, o time rival Ino aparece! Depois de ver Sakura lutar contra os ninjas do Som, eles decidem ajudá-la. Com a formação de batalha "Ino-Shika-Cho", o time Ino tenta deter os atacantes… Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Formação De Batalha: Ino-Shika-Cho - T01E33

programme.title: 2020. Os ninjas do Som partem depois de enfrentar o poder de Sasuke. O time de Naruto tem um momento para se recuperar. Kiba consegue o segundo pergaminho e seu time vai em direção à torre. O parceiro canino de Kiba, Akamaru, nota algo adiante e para. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Akamaru Treme: A Força Cruel De Gaara
programme.desc: Naruto: Akamaru Treme: A Força Cruel De Gaara - T01E34

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e a equipe finalmente descansam. Já se passaram quatro dias desde o início da prova, restando apenas um para o fim. Naruto sugere duplicar o pergaminho do céu, que ainda precisam ter, e tenta abrir o pergaminho da terra, supostamente selado. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Segredo Do Pergaminho, Não É Permitido Olhar
programme.desc: Naruto: O Segredo Do Pergaminho, Não É Permitido Olhar - T01E35

programme.title: 2020. O time de Naruto se junta a Kabuto, mas eles são presos por um genjutsu (técnica ilusória). Eles caminham na mesma área várias vezes, perdem energia e lutam contra os vários clones criados pela técnica. Naruto os derrota, mas o número não diminui. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Clone Contra Clone: Os Meus São Melhores Que Os Seus
programme.desc: Naruto: Clone Contra Clone: Os Meus São Melhores Que Os Seus - T01E36

programme.title: 2020. Quando Naruto e seu time chegam à a torre e abrem os dois pergaminhos, Iruka aparece e explica o espírito do ninja chunin (nível médio) aos estudantes da Academia Ninja. Agora ele confia em Naruto e seu time. Anko fala com o Hokage sobre Orochimaru. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Sobrevivendo Ao Corte: Os Nove Novatos Juntos Outra Vez
programme.desc: Naruto: Sobrevivendo Ao Corte: Os Nove Novatos Juntos Outra Vez - T01E37

programme.title: 2020. Os 21 ninjas que passaram na segunda parte da prova se juntam para o próximo desafio. Seus rostos demonstram várias emoções profundas. Mas como um número muito alto passou na segunda prova, as preliminares da terceira começarão imediatamente... Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Estreitando O Campo, Morte Súbita, Eliminação!
programme.desc: Naruto: Estreitando O Campo, Morte Súbita, Eliminação! - T01E38

programme.title: 2020. Na terceira prova os combates são um contra um. O primeiro é entre Sasuke e Yoroi, o capanga de Orochimaru. Yoroi encurrala Sasuke, que não consegue usar seu Sharingan por causa da Marca da Maldição no pescoço. Yoroi absorve o chakra para fora de Sasuke. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Ciúme Do Sobrancelhudo, A Rajada De Leões Se Solta!
programme.desc: Naruto: O Ciúme Do Sobrancelhudo, A Rajada De Leões Se Solta! - T01E39

programme.title: Naruto: Naruto Uzumaki Chegando! - T01E01
programme.desc: 2020. Bem-vindo à Aldeia Oculta da folha, onde ninjas assassinos percorrem a terra, e o travesso Naruto Uzumaki apronta encrenca aonde for. Ao roubar o antigo pergaminho do selo, ele libera um poder único raramente visto em um garoto de 12 anos! Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto: Meu Nome É Konohamaru - T01E02
programme.desc: 2020. Naruto finalmente se forma na Academia Ninja e diz que sabe tudo. Bom, pelo menos é isso que ele conta para Konohamaru, o neto tampinha do líder da aldeia. Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Profecia e a Vingança do Mestre - T06E134
programme.desc: 2009. Naruto usa seu Clone das Sombras para descobrir o paradeiro de Sasuke. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tati Keplmair, Elcio Sodre, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Profecia e a Vingança do Mestre - T06E135
programme.desc: 2009. Itachi relembra o incidente do passado que levou à sua deserção da Aldeia da Folha. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tati Keplmair, Elcio Sodre, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Profecia e a Vingança do Mestre - T06E136
programme.sub-title: A LUZ E A ESCURIDÃO DO MANGEKYO SHARINGAN
programme.desc: 2009. Itachi diz que roubará o Sharingan de Sasuke e conseguirá o poder visual eterno. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tati Keplmair, Elcio Sodre, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter - T01E32
programme.desc: 2012. Kastro cria um "duplo" de si mesmo com o seu domínio do Nen e rouba os braços do Hisoka. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Pedro Volpato, Gabriel Martins, Wallace Raj, Vitor Mello, Dlaigelles Silva Diretor: Hiroshi Koujina

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter - T01E33
programme.desc: 2012. Gon e Killua retomam o treinamento de Nen. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Pedro Volpato, Gabriel Martins, Wallace Raj, Vitor Mello, Dlaigelles Silva Diretor: Hiroshi Koujina

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E04
programme.desc: 2014. Kakyoin ataca um Stand sem saber quem é o seu usuário. Jotaro e seus aliados encontram um dos assassinos a mando de DIO no voo para o Egito. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda

programme.title: One Piece - T01E25
programme.sub-title: O Despertar dos Chutes Implacáveis! Sanji vs. Pearl, a Muralha de Ferro!
programme.desc: 2000. A batalha pelo Baratie continua, com Zeff e os cozinheiros contra o bando de Krieg. Luffy e seus companheiros se unem à luta, mas as coisas não estão fáceis! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu

programme.title: One Piece - T01E26
programme.sub-title: O Sonho de Zeff e Sanji! O Mar dos Sonhos, All Blue!
programme.desc: 2000. Sanji recorda sua infância, como aprendiz de chef a bordo de um navio atacado por Zeff Perna Rubra! Quando o jovem Sanji fica à deriva, é o próprio terrível capitão que o resgata. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu

programme.title: Street Fighter II V - T01E07
programme.desc: 1995. Depois de perseguir e capturar diversos membros da Ashura, Capitão Dorai sente a ira da organização criminosa. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Chisa Yokoyama, Kenji Haga, Kenji Utsumi, Kōji Tsujitani, Ryōichi Tanaka, Tesshō Genda Diretor: Gisaburo Sugii

programme.title: Street Fighter II V - T01E08
programme.desc: 1995. Ken e Ryu perseguem a Ashura até a Tailândia, mas a caçada é interrompida quando Ryu é preso por uma falsa acusação de posse de drogas. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Chisa Yokoyama, Kenji Haga, Kenji Utsumi, Kōji Tsujitani, Ryōichi Tanaka, Tesshō Genda Diretor: Gisaburo Sugii

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Kawaki: O confronto com Kara - T14E195
programme.desc: 2021. Kawaki sai com Naruto para comprar um vaso novo para substituir o que ele quebrou. A caminho da Floricultura Yamanaka, Sarada se junta a eles. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Kawaki: O confronto com Kara - T14E196
programme.desc: 2021. Kawaki assiste a um combate shinobi mano a mano entre Naruto e Boruto. Boruto usa a sua especialidade, o Jutsu Clones das Sombras, para enfrentar seu pai, mas tem dificuldade. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations: Kawaki: O confronto com Kara - T14E197
programme.desc: 2021. Para controlarem melhor seus Karmas, Boruto e Kawaki decidem treinar sob circunstâncias mais realistas. Com Naruto e Himawari assistindo, eles ativam seus Karmas e se enfrentam. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Naruto: Sasuke E Sakura, Amigos Ou Inimigos - T01E03
programme.sub-title: Sasuke E Sakura, Amigos Ou Inimigos
programme.desc: 2020. Para se tornar um ninja, Naruto precisa formar uma equipe com seus colegas, a bela Sakura e o sério Sasuke, que têm uma coisa em comum: o ódio que sentem por Naruto. Então, Naruto tenta conquistar Sakura fingindo ser a paixão da vida dela... Sasuke! Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto: Aprovar Ou Reprovar Um Exercício De Sobrevivencia - T01E04
programme.sub-title: Aprovar Ou Reprovar Um Exercício De Sobrevivencia
programme.desc: 2020. Com a equipe formada, Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura conhecem seu sensei, o enigmático Kakashi. Ele propõe um desafio que apenas dois deles podem vencer - quem falhar voltará para a Academia Ninja! Mas eles não sabem que Kakashi nunca deixou ninguém vencer! Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto: Você Falhou A Decisão Finalde Kakashi - T01E05
programme.sub-title: Você Falhou A Decisão Finalde Kakashi
programme.desc: 2020. Com o iminente risco de falhar, Naruto, Sasuke e Sakura fazem de tudo para passar no árduo teste de sobrevivência. Mas esses ninjas egoístas precisarão escutar as palavras sábias de Kakashi para aprenderem sobre trabalho em equipe! Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Profecia e a Vingança do Mestre - T06E137
programme.desc: 2009. Sasuke perde seu olho esquerdo para Itachi, mas percebe que está preso em um Genjutsu. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tati Keplmair, Elcio Sodre, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Profecia e a Vingança do Mestre - T06E138
programme.desc: 2009. Usando os poderes da natureza, Sasuke libera seu novo jutsu Kirin contra o seu irmão. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tati Keplmair, Elcio Sodre, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Profecia e a Vingança do Mestre - T06E139
programme.desc: 2009. Naruto e seus companheiros são detidos por Tobi. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tati Keplmair, Elcio Sodre, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Growing Pains
programme.desc: Bernie makes Vanessa prove she can manage her money.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Bernie's Angels
programme.desc: The kids' carelessness causes Bernie to have a near-death experience.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Hall of Fame
programme.desc: Jordan goes out for football in hopes of winning a trophy for the Bernie Mac Hall of Fame awards shelf; former Oakland Raiders running back Marcus Allen, MVP of Super Bowl XVIII stars.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Sweet Home Chicago
programme.desc: Bernie takes the entire family to Chicago for the funeral of a beloved uncle, but his cousin's (Don Cheadle) scheming mars the trip.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Sweet Home Chicago
programme.desc: Bernie takes the entire family to Chicago for the funeral of a beloved uncle, but the trip is marred by his cousin's scheming.

programme.title: The Harlem Globetrotters: Secrets of the City - Cairo
programme.desc: We race ATVs to the ancient pyramids of Cairo and explore the oldest market in the Middle East during the tour stop in Egypt; Cory Thunder Law takes a break from the action to experience the oldest coffee tradition in the world.

programme.title: The Harlem Globetrotters: Secrets of the City - London
programme.desc: Torch and Moose touch down in London on a mission to uncover the city's best kept secrets, one hidden door at a time.

programme.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management
programme.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote And installation.

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: Never Scrub Your Floors Again
programme.desc: See why this cleaning tool replaces chemicals and hard labor!

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote And installation.

programme.title: Pain Relief Revealed
programme.desc: Discover the hidden story of OmegaXL with John Walsh. He dives deep into the groundbreaking supplement that promises hope and relief for millions battling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Rateescape: Stop Overpaying for Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Urban Indie Film Block - Strands of Life
programme.desc: Holding on to time and relationships even when they are slipping through our fingers.

programme.title: Style Kings - Your Style, Your Perspective
programme.desc: Justin is one of the top interior designers selected for an Atlanta show house; Dedrick hosts a dinner for a group of corporate clients he's known for years who have sought Dedrick's expertise for suiting up in business.

programme.title: Style Kings - Creating and Celebrating Yourself
programme.desc: Dedrick helps client Donna celebrate her 60th birthday with a 60's themed custom party outfit; Justin scopes out a new design project for multi-hyphenate client Nicole who seeks to level up her lead bed/bath sanctuary.

programme.title: Style Kings - Style Kings #103
programme.desc: Style Kings is an intimate peek into a brotherhood of two experts who have open and honest conversations, sharing how their artistic minds shape their approach to fashion and design.

programme.title: Creative Collaborations - Creative Collaboration
programme.desc: Dedrick is tasked with creating legendary looks for TI's Atlanta Symphony Orchestra appearance; Justin goes through multiple iterations in achieving Nicole's desired look, but ultimately, the finished reveal is worth all the work.

programme.title: Where's the Love?
programme.desc: Two relationship experts (Lamman Rucker, Denise Boutté) try to keep up appearances when their own marriage begins to falter.

programme.sub-title: What's the Worst That Could Happen? (2001)
programme.desc: When a professional thief robs a beachfront mansion, he catches the owner in a compromising situation.

programme.title: A Night at the Roxbury (1998)
programme.desc: Desperate to meet women and open their own dance club, brainless brothers Steve (Will Ferrell) and Doug Butabi (Chris Kattan) cruise Beverly Hills.

programme.title: Legally Blonde (2001)
programme.desc: A sorority queen (Reese Witherspoon) enrolls in Harvard to prove to her former boyfriend that she has more than good looks.

programme.title: Legally Blonde 2: Red, White & Blonde (2003)
programme.desc: Fired from her firm, a young Boston lawyer (Reese Witherspoon) heads to Washington, D.C., to fight for animal rights.

programme.title: Heartbreakers (2001)
programme.desc: Mother and daughter con-artists (Sigourney Weaver, Jennifer Love Hewitt) try to swindle a cigarette tycoon, but things go wrong when one falls in love.

programme.title: Raging Bull (1980)
programme.desc: The violent nature of prizefighter Jake LaMotta leads first to a boxing championship, then to a downward spiral of self-destruction.

programme.title: Eight Men Out (1988)
programme.desc: Disgruntled Chicago White Sox stand trial for allegedly throwing the 1919 World Series for mobster Arnold Rothstein (Michael Lerner).

programme.title: From
programme.desc: Boyd tries to save Acosta from herself as Julie digs deeper into her newfound abilities; Tabitha embarks on a desperate gamble and Victor joins Ethan in a quest for answers.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: An ominous discovery puts Boyd and his trusted circle on high alert; Julie searches for a way to harness her newfound abilities and Sara is once again tortured by the voices in her head.

programme.title: From
programme.sub-title: What a Long Strange Trip It's Been
programme.desc: Boyd and Jade set off on a desperate, mind-bending search for answers, while a food run to the settlement takes a chilling turn.

programme.title: The Girl on the Train (2016)
programme.desc: Rachel, who is devastated by her divorce, spends her commute fantasizing about the couple that lives in a house that her train passes. One morning, she sees something shocking and becomes entangled in a missing person's investigation.

programme.title: Blink Twice (2024)
programme.desc: When tech billionaire Slater King meets Frida, he invites her to join him and his friends for a dream vacation on his private island. However, when strange things start to happen, she'll have to uncover the truth if she hopes to make it out alive.

programme.title: Summer Days, Summer Nights (2018)
programme.desc: On the south shore of Long Island in the summer of 1983, a group of working-class teenagers and 20-somethings work their summer jobs, fall in and out of love, and wrestle with what the future holds when the summer ends and the real world beckons.

programme.title: Mulholland Falls (1996)
programme.desc: An ex-lover's murder creates problems for the married head (Nick Nolte) of an elite police unit in early '50s Los Angeles.

programme.title: From
programme.sub-title: What a Long Strange Trip It's Been
programme.desc: Boyd and Jade set off on a desperate, mind-bending search for answers, while a food run to the settlement takes a chilling turn.

programme.title: Run the Tide (2016)
programme.desc: When his drug-addicted mother leaves prison, a man (Taylor Lautner) kidnaps his younger brother (Nico Christou) and flees to the California coast for a better life.

programme.title: The Bellboy (1960)
programme.desc: A mute bellboy (Jerry Lewis) working at the luxurious Fontainebleau Hotel in Miami Beach constantly causes problems with his clumsy mistakes.

programme.title: Coyotes (2025)
programme.desc: Members of a family find themselves in a desperate fight for survival when a pack of coyotes swarms their Hollywood Hills home.

programme.title: Henry V (1989)
programme.desc: Shakespeare's king of England (Kenneth Branagh) attacks France and declares his love for the French king's daughter.

programme.title: Carrie (2013)
programme.desc: Tormented by her peers and sheltered by her religious mother (Julianne Moore), an awkward teenager (Chloë Grace Moretz) unleashes her hidden, telekinetic powers after a sick prank at her senior prom pushes her over the edge.

programme.title: Code of Silence (1985)
programme.desc: A Chicago police detective (Chuck Norris) attacks a cocaine warehouse with a remote-controlled item called the Prowler.

programme.title: Biker Boyz (2003)
programme.desc: A young prodigy (Derek Luke) threatens the undefeated champion (Laurence Fishburne) of an underground club of motorcycle racers.

programme.title: Missing in Action (1984)
programme.desc: A U.S. colonel (Chuck Norris) escapes from the Viet Cong, then comes back with a floating arsenal to get others out.

programme.title: In the Line of Fire (1993)
programme.desc: An assassin toys with a White House Secret Service agent haunted for 30 years by his failure in 1963 Dallas.

programme.title: Valkyrie (2008)
programme.desc: Fearing that Hitler will destroy his beloved Germany, Col. Claus von Stauffenberg joins a group of high-ranking men who are plotting to assassinate him.

programme.title: Jack Reacher: Never Go Back (2016)
programme.desc: Investigator Jack Reacher (Tom Cruise) goes on the lam to uncover the truth behind a major government conspiracy that involves the death of U.S. soldiers.

programme.title: Two Rode Together (1961)
programme.desc: A Texas marshal (James Stewart) and a cavalry officer (Richard Widmark) recover long-held captives from Comanches.

programme.title: Support Your Local Sheriff! (1969)
programme.desc: A stranger (James Garner) tames an Old West boomtown and woos the mayor's daughter (Joan Hackett) on his way to Australia.

programme.title: The Italian Job (1969)
programme.desc: A British crook (Michael Caine) robs gold ingots in Italy by having a computer expert (Benny Hill) cause a traffic jam.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven Ride! (1972)
programme.desc: A marshal (Lee Van Cleef), an Eastern reporter and five ex-convicts rescue widows from Mexican bandits.

programme.title: The SpongeBob Movie: Search for SquarePants (2025)
programme.sub-title: The SpongeBob Movie: Search for SquarePants (2025)
programme.desc: Hoping to prove his bravery to Mr. Krabs, SpongeBob follows a mysterious, swashbuckling ghost pirate known as the Flying Dutchman on a seafaring adventure that takes him to the deepest depths of the ocean.

programme.title: Dirty Work (1998)
programme.desc: Unable to find gainful employment, two underachievers (Norm Macdonald, Artie Lange) establish a revenge-for-hire business.

programme.title: Marathon Man (1976)
programme.desc: The CIA and a Nazi death-camp dentist (Laurence Olivier) chase a New York graduate student (Dustin Hoffman).

programme.title: Mulholland Falls (1996)
programme.desc: An ex-lover's murder creates problems for the married head (Nick Nolte) of an elite police unit in early '50s Los Angeles.

programme.title: To Live and Die in L.A. (1985)
programme.sub-title: To Live and Die in L.A. (1985)
programme.desc: A Secret Service agent (William L. Petersen) bends and breaks the law to nab an artist/counterfeiter (Willem Dafoe) in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Collateral (2004)
programme.desc: A contract killer hijacks a cab and forces the driver to transport him to his assigned jobs in Los Angeles.

programme.title: From
programme.sub-title: What a Long Strange Trip It's Been
programme.desc: Boyd and Jade set off on a desperate, mind-bending search for answers, while a food run to the settlement takes a chilling turn.

programme.title: The Da Vinci Code (2006)
programme.desc: A murder in the Louvre Museum and clues in paintings by Leonardo da Vinci lead to the discovery of a religious mystery that could rock the foundations of Christianity.

programme.title: Double Jeopardy (1999)
programme.desc: In an insurance scam, a man fakes his death and sets his wife up to take the blame. After serving 10 years in prison, she sets out to get revenge, immune from the law since she cannot be re-prosecuted for the same crime.

programme.title: Below (2002)
programme.desc: Mysterious events occur aboard a submarine after its crew (Matthew Davis, Bruce Greenwood) rescues three survivors from a sunken ship during World War II.

programme.title: The Sons of Katie Elder (1965)

programme.title: Sunset Boulevard (1950)

programme.title: Invaders From Mars (1986)
programme.desc: A boy sees his parents and neighbors act like zombies after a flying saucer lands in his backyard.

programme.title: Ironweed (1987)

programme.title: Much Ado About Nothing (1993)

programme.title: Children of a Lesser God (1986)
programme.desc: Starting his new job as an instructor at a New England school for the deaf, James Leeds meets Sarah Norman, a young deaf woman who works at the school as a member of the custodial staff.

programme.title: West Side Story (1961)
programme.desc: Against a backdrop of vicious gang warfare between the New Yorker Jets and the Puerto Rican Sharks, a romance develops across rival lines. 1960s update of "Romeo and Juliet", with amazing song and dance sequences.

programme.title: Sense and Sensibility (1995)
programme.desc: Suitors romance, then abandon, sisters (Emma Thompson, Kate Winslet) left destitute by their father's death in late-1800s England.

programme.title: Snake Eyes (1998)
programme.desc: A corrupt detective (Nicolas Cage) and his Navy friend (Gary Sinise) probe a U.S. official's assassination at an Atlantic City boxing match.

programme.title: Enemy at the Gates (2001)
programme.desc: A Nazi sniper (Ed Harris) travels to Stalingrad to find and kill a Russian sharpshooter (Jude Law), the hero of the propaganda campaign of a political officer (Joseph Fiennes).

programme.title: Reindeer Games (2000)
programme.desc: An ex-convict (Ben Affleck) wants to start a new life with his girlfriend (Charlize Theron), but her brother (Gary Sinise) involves him in a scheme to rob a casino.

programme.title: The Hunt for Red October (1990)
programme.desc: Moscow, Washington and a CIA analyst (Alec Baldwin) track a renegade Soviet captain (Sean Connery) and his new submarine.

programme.title: Scream (1996)
programme.desc: A psycho killer targets a past victim's daughter (Neve Campbell), while a tabloid TV reporter (Courteney Cox) homes in on his identity.

programme.title: Scream 2 (1997)
programme.desc: A masked killer continues to pursue a California student (Neve Campbell) and her friends at an Ohio college.

programme.title: Urban Cowboy (1980)
programme.desc: A Texas farmer (John Travolta) moves to the city, immerses himself in honky-tonk and falls for a sexy cowgirl (Debra Winger).

programme.title: Supercop (1992)
programme.desc: A Hong Kong policeman (Jackie Chan) and a mainland policewoman (Michelle Yeaoh) meet, team up and join a drug ring to destroy it.

programme.title: Crocodile Dundee (1986)
programme.desc: A rich reporter tours outback Australia with a crocodile hunter, then brings him to Manhattan.

programme.title: Crocodile Dundee II (1988)
programme.desc: Colombian drug dealers pursue the outback he-man (Paul Hogan) and his Manhattan girlfriend (Linda Kozlowski) in Australia.

programme.title: Uncommon Valor (1983)
programme.desc: A colonel with a sponsor leads five Marine veterans into Laos to find his son and others missing in action.

programme.title: Flags of Our Fathers (2006)
programme.desc: Some of the servicemen who raised the U.S. flag on Mount Suribachi during the Battle of Iwo Jima at the end of World War II live to hear of their status as heroes.

programme.title: Terminator: Dark Fate (2019)
programme.desc: Seasoned warrior Sarah Connor joins forces with a hybrid cyborg human and the T-800 model to protect a young woman from the Rev-9 -- a newly modified and seemingly indestructible liquid Terminator from the future.

programme.title: Gladiator (2000)
programme.desc: A former Roman General sets out to exact vengeance against the corrupt emperor who murdered his family and sent him into slavery.

programme.title: Gasoline Alley (2022)
programme.desc: Set in the underbelly of Los Angeles, a man is drawn into a high-profile triple murder. The two police detectives on his tail soon join him in attempting to uncover an explosive conspiracy.

programme.title: Breach (2020)
programme.desc: Fleeing a devastating plague on Earth, an interstellar ark comes under attack from a new threat -- a shape-shifting alien force intent on slaughtering what's left of humanity.

programme.title: Saving Private Ryan (1998)
programme.desc: A World War II captain (Tom Hanks) and his squad (Edward Burns, Tom Sizemore) risk all to locate and send home a soldier whose three brothers died in combat.

programme.title: Ali (2001)
programme.desc: Muhammad Ali (Will Smith) battles Sonny Liston, Joe Frazier and George Foreman and raises controversy outside the ring.

programme.title: Bruce Lee: The Legend (1984)
programme.desc: The martial artist is seen in clips and recalled by Steve McQueen, James Coburn and others who knew him.

programme.title: Pelé: Birth of a Legend (2016)
programme.desc: Under guidance from manager Vicente Feola (Vincent D'Onofrio), young Pelé (Kevin de Paula) utilizes his street soccer skills to lead Brazil to the World Cup in 1958.

programme.title: Star Trek: Nemesis (2002)
programme.desc: The crew (Jonathan Frakes, Brent Spiner) of the Enterprise must prevent a replica of Capt. Picard (Patrick Stewart) from overtaking Earth.

programme.title: Outlaw Posse (2024)
programme.desc: In 1908 an outlaw returns from years of hiding in Mexico to claim stolen gold hidden in the hills of Montana.

programme.title: World Trade Center (2006)
programme.desc: Two Port Authority officers become trapped in the rubble of the World Trade Center after going in to help people escape from the buildings during the terrorist attacks of September 11, 2001.

programme.title: Breakdown (1997)
programme.desc: A man's (Kurt Russell) wife (Kathleen Quinlan) disappears in the desert Southwest after accepting a trucker's (J.T. Walsh) help with car trouble.

programme.title: Undisputed (2002)
programme.desc: An undefeated world-champion prizefighter, who is convicted of rape and sent to prison, must confront and fight the reigning prison boxing champion.

programme.title: Most Wanted (2020)
programme.desc: An investigative reporter fights to expose the twisted truth behind a heroin bust orchestrated by dirty cops to frame an innocent man -- sentencing him to life in a Thai prison.

programme.title: Memories of Murder (2003)
programme.desc: An urban detective (Kim Sang-kyung) and two rural policemen (Song Kang-ho, Kim Roi-ha) investigate a series of brutal killings in a small town.

programme.title: Seven Psychopaths (2012)
programme.desc: A struggling screenwriter (Colin Farrell) finds himself inadvertently entangled in the criminal underworld when his knucklehead friends (Christopher Walken, Sam Rockwell) abduct a mobster's beloved Shih Tzu.

programme.title: Mob Town (2019)
programme.desc: The FBI and a local cop track various members of organized crime families as they gather for a huge meeting in upstate New York in 1957.

programme.title: 2 Days in the Valley (1996)
programme.desc: A hit man (Danny Aiello) falls for an art dealer's helper (Glenne Headly) amid confusion in the San Fernando Valley.

programme.title: Cursed (2005)
programme.desc: Siblings (Christina Ricci, Jesse Eisenberg) hunt for the werewolf that attacked them and transformed them into lycanthropes.

programme.title: Shaolin Soccer (2001)
programme.desc: A soccer coach persuades a kung-fu master and his former classmates to form a team and play for $1 million.

programme.title: Wolves (2016)
programme.desc: A talented high school basketball player's (Taylor John Smith) dreams of playing college ball are jeopardized by his hard-drinking father's (Michael Shannon) compulsive gambling.

programme.title: Pariah: The Lives and Deaths of Sonny Liston (2019)
programme.sub-title: Pariah: The Lives and Deaths of Sonny Liston (2019)
programme.desc: The life and suspicious death of boxer Sonny Liston.

programme.title: S.O.G.: The Book of Ward (2023)
programme.desc: Andre Ward, facing an all-too familiar series of obstacles, defies the odds and silences his critics with an undefeated boxing career, but walks away after choosing his role as a father and a husband over boxing.

programme.title: Eric Clapton: Life in 12 Bars (2017)
programme.desc: Eric Clapton is widely renowned as one of the greatest performers of all time. His isolated pursuit of his craft, and fear of selling out, served as a catalyst for his evolution as an artist.

programme.title: The Tuxedo (2002)
programme.desc: A chauffeur (Jackie Chan) embarks on a covert mission after a tuxedo from a secret agent (Jason Isaacs) gives him extraordinary abilities.

programme.title: Cold Mountain (2003)
programme.desc: During the Civil War, a wounded Confederate soldier (Jude Law) abandons his duties to make his way home to his sweetheart (Nicole Kidman).

programme.title: True Grit (2010)
programme.desc: A teenage girl (Hailee Steinfeld) enlists the aid of a boozy, trigger-happy lawman (Jeff Bridges) to hunt down her father's killer (Josh Brolin).

programme.title: Ida Red (2021)
programme.desc: Crime boss Ida "Red" Walker turns to her son, Wyatt, to pull off one last heist to get out of prison. However, with the FBI closing in, Wyatt must soon choose between family and freedom.

programme.title: The Fan (1981)
programme.desc: Douglas, a record salesman, is an obsessive fan of actress Sally Ross. When his letters are rejected, he strikes out at her and her loved ones.

programme.title: Queen Bees (2021)
programme.desc: While her house undergoes repairs, fiercely independent senior Helen temporarily moves into a nearby retirement community, where she encounters lusty widows, cutthroat bridge tournaments and a hotbed of bullying "mean girls."

programme.title: Spotlights: A Showtime Short Film Series
programme.desc: A collection of short films showcasing different themes.

programme.title: Alone in Berlin (2016)
programme.desc: A German couple lose their son in WWII, prompting them to become secretly anti-Nazi.

programme.title: Terms of Endearment (1983)
programme.desc: A strong-willed woman (Shirley MacLaine) and her equally independent daughter (Debra Winger) keep the lines of communication open as each deals with the curveballs life throws at them.

programme.title: Florence Foster Jenkins (2016)
programme.desc: In the 1940s New York, a man (Hugh Grant) goes to extreme lengths to make sure his wife (Meryl Streep) never finds out that she's an awful opera singer.

programme.title: The English Patient (1996)
programme.desc: A Hungarian count's (Ralph Fiennes) fling with a British newlywed leads to tragedy in World War II North Africa.

programme.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider (2001)
programme.desc: A beautiful globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) battles otherworldly creatures for possession of a powerful artifact.

programme.title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.sub-title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.desc: A globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) must find Pandora's box before a maniacal scientist (Ciarán Hinds) can harness its power for world domination.

programme.title: Waking Up in Reno (2002)
programme.desc: A married man (Billy Bob Thornton) has an affair with his best friend's wife (Charlize Theron) while both couples travel from Arkansas to Nevada.

programme.title: The Friend (2024)
programme.desc: Iris finds her comfortable New York City life thrown into disarray after her closest friend and mentor bequeaths her a Great Dane named Apollo. Yet as Iris finds herself unexpectedly bonding with Apollo, she begins to come to terms with her past.

programme.title: I Used to Go Here (2020)
programme.desc: A successful author finds herself deeply enmeshed in the lives of a group of college students after being asked to speak at her alma mater.

programme.title: Jenny's Wedding (2015)
programme.desc: When Jenny (Katherine Heigl) decides to marry a woman (Alexis Bledel), her conventional family must accept who she is or risk losing her forever.

programme.title: Anything for Fame
programme.desc: Venturing into the virtual Wild West to profile a new breed of content creator.

programme.title: Abandon (2002)
programme.desc: A detective (Benjamin Bratt) discovers new facts regarding the disappearance of a collegian's (Katie Holmes) boyfriend (Charlie Hunnam) two years earlier.

programme.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider (2001)
programme.desc: A beautiful globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) battles otherworldly creatures for possession of a powerful artifact.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part (2017)
programme.desc: Michael and Madison Roland are a married couple; Michael Roland’s controlling behavior leads a pregnant Madison Roland to leave the home; she later discovers that her previous circumstances continue to affect her current life.

programme.title: Love Me (2024)
programme.desc: A buoy and a satellite meet online long after humanity's extinction. As they learn what life was like on Earth, they discover themselves and what it means to be alive and in love.

programme.title: Nothing Compares (2022)
programme.desc: Following the career of singer Sinéad O'Connor through her rise to fame and how her iconoclastic personality led to her exile from the pop mainstream.

programme.title: The Prize Winner of Defiance, Ohio (2005)
programme.sub-title: The Prize Winner of Defiance, Ohio (2005)
programme.desc: A '50s-era housewife (Julianne Moore) uses her wit and winnings from commercial jingle contests to help support her large family.

programme.title: Stepping Out (1991)
programme.desc: A professional singer/dancer (Liza Minnelli) grooms her diverse amateur-dance class for a charity tap show.

programme.title: A Single Man (2009)
programme.desc: Planning to commit suicide at the end of the day, a gay professor (Colin Firth) who recently lost his lover goes about his daily routine and visits with longtime friends.

programme.title: Atlantic City (1980)
programme.desc: A boardwalk numbers runner (Burt Lancaster) feels young again with a casino clam shucker (Susan Sarandon) and a lucky cocaine deal.

programme.title: Irena's Vow (2023)
programme.desc: Caught in a German roundup to be used as a slave laborer, Polish nurse Irena Gut becomes a German army major's housekeeper during World War II. Irena risks her life to conceal a dozen Jews within the major's home.

programme.title: A Mighty Heart (2007)
programme.desc: Mariane Pearl (Angelina Jolie) begins a terrifying search for her husband, journalist Daniel Pearl (Dan Futterman), after he is kidnapped by terrorists in 2002 Pakistan.

programme.title: The Peacemaker (1997)
programme.desc: A scientist (Nicole Kidman) and an Army Special Forces colonel (George Clooney) travel the globe in pursuit of stolen nuclear weapons.

programme.title: The General's Daughter (1999)
programme.desc: Two investigators (John Travolta, Madeleine Stowe) find an underworld of sex and cover-ups behind an Army captain's murder.

programme.title: The Autopsy of Jane Doe (2016)
programme.desc: When father and son coroners investigate the death of a beautiful "Jane Doe," they find increasingly bizarre clues.

programme.title: Guns Up (2025)
programme.desc: After a job goes horribly wrong, a man who moonlights as a mob henchman has one night to get his family out of the city while keeping his dark secret hidden.

programme.title: Atlantic City (1980)
programme.desc: A boardwalk numbers runner (Burt Lancaster) feels young again with a casino clam shucker (Susan Sarandon) and a lucky cocaine deal.

programme.title: Sheryl (2022)
programme.desc: Singer-songwriter Sheryl Crow rises to superstardom and finds a way to turn even her darkest experiences into captivating, timeless work -- creating a legacy that continues to inspire and influence generations.

programme.title: The Sense of an Ending (2017)
programme.desc: A business owner (Jim Broadbent) reunites with his first love (Charlotte Rampling) after a letter and a diary force him to confront the past.

programme.title: Backcountry (2014)
programme.desc: A couple (Missy Peregrym, Jeff Roop) on a deep-wilderness hike become hopelessly lost within an aggressive black bear's territory.

programme.title: Parallel (2024)
programme.desc: Following the journey of Vanessa, a grief-stricken woman who mysteriously finds herself navigating between parallel spaces.

programme.title: Would You Rather (2012)
programme.desc: Iris (Brittany Snow) and seven other desperate people become trapped in Shepard's (Jeffrey Combs) mansion. Shepard forces them to play a sadistic game for a large sum of money -- but the dilemmas become increasingly deadly.

programme.title: Winter Spring Summer or Fall (2024)
programme.desc: Young Remi has her future figured out, until she meets Barnes, who lives for the moment and makes her question everything. As their love story unfolds, she faces a choice -- stick to her plan or risk it all for a life she never saw coming.

programme.title: Jersey Girl (2004)
programme.desc: A young woman (Liv Tyler) changes the life of a single father (Ben Affleck) who used to be a successful New York music publicist.

programme.title: Wild Fly
programme.desc: The Brown trout of the Natal Midlands have a reputation that entices fly fishers every season. To catch a wild brown in a river and a lake in the same day is no easy feat. WildFly attempt this mini McNab.

programme.title: Wild Fish Masterclass With Mike Robinson
programme.desc: Mike and Chef James Erasmus create their own version of a classic Indian dish, Kedgeree Royale with hot smoked Bass.

programme.title: Hooked on Africa
programme.desc: The yacht Adventurer is aptly named for it does indeed take you on the fishing adventure of a lifetime! A chance to fish untouched reefs and islands in the Indian Ocean, where 50kg plus GT's roam wild and pack attacks are common.

programme.title: Hooked on Africa
programme.desc: When travelling to the Kwanza River in Angola it is easy to be distracted by the prospect of landing a record Tarpon or Jack Crevalle. You may forget what can happen when you leave something enticing on the surface.

programme.title: Wild Fly
